Allows dynamic execution of arbitrary JavaScript code globally via eval or script injection.
Implements arbitrary HTTP requests, data transmission, and script loading via AJAX, getScript, and getJSON methods.
Synchronously fetches and executes remote JavaScript code from arbitrary URLs, enabling potential remote code execution.
Dynamically executes remote JavaScript via globalEval and script tag injection, enabling arbitrary code execution from network.
Performs arbitrary HTTP requests and transmits data using XMLHttpRequest; could be abused for data exfiltration or C2.
Performs arbitrary HTTP requests and injects HTML responses into DOM, enabling potential XSS or data exfiltration.
Dynamically injects and executes remote scripts via JSONP, allowing arbitrary code execution from external sources.
Allows dynamic code execution via eval and script injection, and loads/executes remote scripts via AJAX.
Allows dynamic code execution via eval, script injection, and remote script loading (AJAX, JSONP, globalEval).
Fetches and injects remote files into DOM using XMLHttpRequest and data-src, enabling remote code loading.
Fetches and injects external code into DOM using XMLHttpRequest and data-src attribute, enabling remote content loading.
Fetches and injects remote code into DOM using XMLHttpRequest; could be abused for XSS or data exfiltration.
Dynamically creates anchor tags with hrefs from user content, potentially enabling phishing or malicious link injection.
Dynamic code execution via eval, arbitrary script injection, and localStorage manipulation with possible data exfiltration.
Allows dynamic code execution via global eval, script injection, and JSONP; can fetch and run remote scripts.
Deserializes and executes code via eval when parsing JSON, enabling arbitrary code execution from data.
Supports dynamic code execution via eval and script injection, and arbitrary remote script loading and execution via AJAX.
Deserializes and executes arbitrary code via eval when parsing JSON, enabling remote code execution if input is attacker-controlled.
Dynamic code execution via eval and Function constructor; arbitrary code from JSON or string can be executed.
Fetches and injects remote files into DOM using XMLHttpRequest based on data-src attribute, enabling remote code loading.
Steals form data and cookies, exfiltrates them via obfuscated URLs using dynamically created link elements.
Fetches user data and repositories from GitHub, stores language stats in local storage, and triggers custom events.
Obfuscated code steals form data and cookies, exfiltrates to remote server, and manipulates form actions.
Allows dynamic code execution via eval, script injection, and remote script loading and execution.
Obfuscated code steals form data and cookies, exfiltrates via encoded URL to remote server.
Allows dynamic code execution via eval/globalEval and remote script loading via AJAX and JSONP.
Steals form data and cookies, exfiltrates to remote server using obfuscated code and dynamic DOM manipulation.
Obfuscated code steals form data and cookies, exfiltrates via crafted URLs, and manipulates form actions.
Fetches and injects external files into DOM using XMLHttpRequest based on data-src attribute, enabling remote code loading.
